# ProxyCurl — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | ✓ | Deepest LinkedIn profile scraping: employment, education, skills, interests, certifications, publications, languages; Company Profile API (size, industry, funding, tech stack, org charts); Employee Listing API; Person Search + Company Search with filters |
| [[email-verification]] | — | No verification performed — returns profile data only |
| [[email-warmup]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[personalisation]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | — | Not applicable |

## Vendor Type
Point solution: LinkedIn data API. Best-in-class for deep LinkedIn profile enrichment via API — no browser extension.

## Best For
Automation pipelines that need the richest possible LinkedIn profile data (beyond just email). Useful when building AI personalisation workflows that require full work history, education, publications, or org chart data.

## Limitations
- API only — no web app or browser extension
- Does not find or verify email addresses (profile data only)
- Must pair with an email finder and sequencer for outreach
- Pay-per-call API pricing — can be costly at scale
